rulings.Case Title: VISHAL GROVER VS. WILLIAM CAMPBELL et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Protective Order
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday May 12, 2016, line 1. CROSS COMPLAINANT WILLIAM CAMPBELL, MARJORIE CAMPBELL Notice Of Motion For Protective Order DENIED. Cross-Complainant's motion is untimely and fails to adequately explain reason for the delay. In addition, Cross-Complainant fails to establish good cause for the protective order given that the settlement agreement could reasonably lead to the discovery of admissible evidence (See Glenfed Development Corp. v. Superior Court (1997) 53 Cal.App.4th 1113, 1117.) = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ET AL VS. CHUCK M. POST ET AL

rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday May 12, 2016, line 3. PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA, Notice Of Motion And Motion For Preliminary Injunction Hearing required. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ALBERT H. WONG VS. BAYVIEW LOAN SERVICING ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday May 12, 2016, line 4. DEFENDANT BAYVIEW LOAN SERVICING, LLC DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED. First, Plaintiff is not required to allege tender. Second, a loan servicer generally owes a duty to exercise reasonable care in the review of a loan modification application, which Plaintiff adequaltely alleges did not occur. (See Alvarez v. BAC Homes Loans Servicing, L.P. (2014) 228 Cal.App.4th 941.) Defendant is ordered to file its Answer within 10 days of the date of the notice of entry of order. = (501/REQ)
